event: message_start
data: {"type":"message_start","message":{"id":"064a7b165e938cd0e577a4ebf6401293","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[],"model":"MiniMax-M2.7","stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":212,"output_tokens":0},"service_tier":"standard"}}

event: ping
data: {"type":"ping"}

event: content_block_start
data: {"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"thinking","thinking":""}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"thinking_delta","thinking":"The user"}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"thinking_delta","thinking":" is asking about the weather in San Francisco. I should use the get_weather function to get the current weather information for San Francisco."}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"signature_delta","signature":"992b700db6f6e62fe512102e69740ffbadf25ec6a6815a9a97020b5571ed8298"}}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}

event: content_block_start
data: {"type":"content_block_start","index":1,"content_block":{"type":"tool_use","id":"call_function_cbt8id1w4x85_1","name":"get_weather","input":{}}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":1,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"location\": \"San Francisco\"}"}}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"type":"content_block_stop","index":1}

event: message_delta
data: {"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use"},"usage":{"input_tokens":212,"output_tokens":58}}

event: message_stop
